mapper.sql: select A.id articleId, A.slug articleSlug, A.title articleTitle, A.description articleDescription, A.body articleBody, A.created_at articleCreatedAt, A.updated_at articleUpdatedAt, A.user_id userId, T.name tagName from articles A left join article_tags ATag on A.id = ATag.article_id left join tags T on ATag.tag_id = T.id
